channel.title: Dev Kantesaria — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by Dev Kantesaria (Valley Forge Capital) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: Dev Kantesaria: ADDED MCO (+4%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Dev Kantesaria (Valley Forge Capital) added MCO in Q4 2025 · 22.4% of portfolio. Top conviction — adding to 15+ year Moody's position.

item.title: Dev Kantesaria: ADDED MSCI (+8%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Dev Kantesaria (Valley Forge Capital) added MSCI in Q4 2025 · 15.3% of portfolio. Index monopoly add.

item.title: Dev Kantesaria: ADDED HEI (+12%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Dev Kantesaria (Valley Forge Capital) added HEI in Q4 2025 · 8.4% of portfolio. Building HEICO — aerospace aftermarket.

item.title: Dev Kantesaria: TRIMMED INTU (-15%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Dev Kantesaria (Valley Forge Capital) trimmed INTU (INTUIT) in Q4 2025 · 4.2% of portfolio.

item.title: Dev Kantesaria: ADDED FICO (+6%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Dev Kantesaria (Valley Forge Capital) added FICO in Q3 2025 · 18.7% of portfolio. Adding to credit scoring monopoly.

item.title: Dev Kantesaria: ADDED V (+5%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Dev Kantesaria (Valley Forge Capital) added V in Q3 2025 · 12.8% of portfolio. Small Visa add.

item.title: Dev Kantesaria: TRIMMED INTU (-11%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Dev Kantesaria (Valley Forge Capital) trimmed INTU (INTUIT) in Q2 2025 · 5.8% of portfolio.

item.title: Dev Kantesaria: TRIMMED INTU (-26%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Dev Kantesaria (Valley Forge Capital) trimmed INTU (INTUIT) in Q1 2025 · 5.2% of portfolio.

item.title: Dev Kantesaria: TRIMMED INTU (-10%) · Q4 2024
item.description: Dev Kantesaria (Valley Forge Capital) trimmed INTU (INTUIT) in Q4 2024 · 6.9% of portfolio.

item.title: Dev Kantesaria: NEW POSITION MSCI (+100%) · Q4 2024
item.description: Dev Kantesaria (Valley Forge Capital) new position MSCI (MSCI INC) in Q4 2024 · 1.0% of portfolio.

item.title: Dev Kantesaria: ADDED MCO (+6%) · Q3 2024
item.description: Dev Kantesaria (Valley Forge Capital) added MCO (MOODYS CORP) in Q3 2024 · 16.9% of portfolio.
